plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Skills, plugins, and config for AI coding agents

plugins.name: observability
plugins.description: Comprehensive hook logging - tracks tool usage, sessions, turns, prompts, subagents, compactions, notifications, and permissions with JSONL files and optional Loki push.

plugins.name: skill-router
plugins.description: Injects a skill-routing meta-skill at session start and emits just-in-time skill advisories before high-signal Bash commands (npm install, cargo add, git commit, dotnet add package, etc).
